title: 4-Quadrant IV Acquisition (G14)
comment: POST this body to /api/iv/4q/start. The SMU sweeps V across [vmin,vmax]; cross zero in both directions to exercise all four quadrants. Use four_wire=true for Kelvin sensing to remove cable resistance from the IV trace.
derived_metrics: voc   — open-circuit voltage (linear interp at I=0)
isc   — short-circuit current (linear interp at V=0)
eta   — efficiency vs 1000 W/m² over 1.6 m² (default)
